# defectdojo_credential (Resource)

DefectDojo Credential

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "defectdojo_credential" "example" {
  name        = "Web App Admin"
  environment = 1
  username    = "admin"
  role        = "admin"
  url         = "https://app.example.com/login"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment` (Number) The ID of the environment for this credential
- `name` (String) The name of the Credential
- `role` (String) The role for the credential
- `url` (String) The URL for the credential
- `username` (String) The username for the credential

### Optional

- `authentication` (String) Authentication type: 'Form' or 'SSO'
- `description` (String) A description of the credential
- `http_authentication` (String) HTTP authentication type: 'Basic' or 'NTLM'
- `is_valid` (Boolean) Whether the credential is valid
- `login_regex` (String) Login regex pattern
- `logout_regex` (String) Logout regex pattern

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import defectdojo_credential.example 123
```
